title: Leather covering
description: A simple mod, that allows you to craft leather covering that adds extra durability to your tools!
body:
The main thing of the mod is the leather covering itself, crafted from 4 leather it can be applied to any tool in a crafting to create a tool with 250+ extra durability and making it fixable with leather (also applying the leather covering to the tool removes enchants but that should be obvious). Also leatherworkers can sell the covering at the 3rd level. Made with Mcreator

# ATTENTION!!
Loading into a world with this mod and having optifine with it crashes the game.

# How to install?
Currently its only available for 1.20.1 forge or 1.20.6 NeoForge, just download the jar and put it in your mod folder

# FABROC PLZ
I cant do fabric because there either isnt a fabric loader for Mcreator that works for my version, or doesnt allow for tools, so maybe in the future.
